metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Agent Event ASIM parser for Anthropic Claude Compliance
properties.query:
let Parser = (
    starttime: datetime=datetime(null),
    endtime: datetime=datetime(null),
    agentid_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    agentname_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    username_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    disabled: bool=false,
    pack: bool=false
)
{
    BV_ClaudeCompliance_ComplianceActivities_CL
    | where not(disabled)
    | where (
        (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
        and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
    )
    // AgentID filtering done later in the parser
    // AgentName filtering done later in the parser
    // Username filtering done later in the parser
    | where type_CF != 'compliance_api_accessed' //filter out API requests for logs
    | project-rename
        EventStartTime = created_at,
        EventUid = _ItemId,
        EventOriginalUid = id_CF,
        EventType = type_CF
    | extend
        EventSchema = 'AgentEvent',
        EventSchemaVersion = '0.1.0',
        EventCount = toint(1),
        EventVendor = 'Anthropic',
        EventProduct = 'Claude Enterprise',
        TargetAgentId = coalesce(claude_project_id, claude_chat_id, claude_file_id, claude_artifact_id),
        EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
        ActorIpAddr = tostring(actor.ip_address),
        ActorType = tostring(actor.type),
        ActorUserAgent = tostring(actor.user_agent),
        ActorApiKeyId = tostring(actor.api_key_id),
        ActorUserIdFromActor = tostring(actor.user_id),
        ActorEmail = tostring(actor.email_address),
        ActorUnauthEmail = tostring(actor.unauthenticated_email_address),
        ActorServiceAccountId = tostring(actor.service_account_id),
        TargetAgentName = coalesce(mcp_server_name, plugin_name, skill_name, group_name, service_name, extract(@'/v1/compliance/([^/]+)', 1, url), '')
    | where (
        ((array_length(agentid_has_any) == 0) or (TargetAgentId has_any (agentid_has_any)))
        and ((array_length(agentname_has_any) == 0) or (TargetAgentName has_any (agentname_has_any)))
    )
    | extend
        ActorUserId = coalesce(ActorUserIdFromActor, user_id),
        SrcIpAddr = ActorIpAddr,
        HttpUserAgent = ActorUserAgent,
        ActorUsername = coalesce(ActorEmail, ActorUnauthEmail),
        ActorUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(coalesce(ActorEmail, ActorUnauthEmail)), 'UPN', ''),
        ActorScopeId = coalesce(ActorApiKeyId, ActorServiceAccountId)
    | where ((array_length(username_has_any) == 0) or (ActorUsername has_any (username_has_any)))
    | extend
        EventResult = case(
            status_code >= 200 and status_code < 300, 'Success',
            status_code >= 400, 'Failure',
            ''
        ),
        EventResultDetails = tostring(status_code)
    | extend AdditionalFields = iff(
        pack,
        bag_pack(
            'request_id', request_id,
            'request_method', request_method,
            'status_code', status_code,
            'url', url,
            'claude_chat_id', claude_chat_id,
            'claude_file_id', claude_file_id,
            'claude_project_id', claude_project_id,
            'claude_artifact_id', claude_artifact_id,
            'user_agent', ActorUserAgent,
            'actor_type', ActorType,
            'api_key_id', ActorApiKeyId,
            'service_account_id', ActorServiceAccountId,
            'organization_id', organization_id,
            'organization_uuid', organization_uuid,
            'workspace_id', workspace_id,
            'group_id', group_id,
            'role_id', role_id,
            'session_id', session_id,
            'action', action,
            'decision', decision,
            'reason', reason
        ),
        dynamic({})
    )
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        Type,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventUid,
        EventOriginalUid,
        EventType,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventCount,
        EventVendor,
        EventProduct,
        EventResult,
        EventResultDetails,
        TargetAgentId,
        ActorUserId,
        ActorUsername,
        ActorUsernameType,
        ActorScopeId,
        SrcIpAddr,
        HttpUserAgent,
        Dvc = SrcIpAddr,
        AdditionalFields
};
Parser(
    starttime = starttime,
    endtime = endtime,
    agentid_has_any = agentid_has_any,
    agentname_has_any = agentname_has_any,
    username_has_any = username_has_any,
    disabled = disabled,
    pack = pack
)
